ticker.text: Published counter-index: chips + tested filter live on the window; experiment armed · counter-index → published
counter-index approved: prior-art honesty, tested pure contract, published-only chip union reasoning traced · counter-index review approved
counter-index QA: node suite 5/5 on the pure filter, chips derive from data, empty state links ideas → rc · counter-index → rc
counter-index built: tag chips (published union, AND with text), pure filterCards() behind markers, empty state links th · counter-index → building
live-shift-theater specced: verbatim journal replay, reduced-motion instant, curtain empty-state · live-shift-theater → spec
v7 slate encoded: 11 records at spec fitted to the taxonomy (experiments carry privacy-lawful proxy metrics), ROADMAP v7 · 11 records → spec (new)
Audit-001: bootstrap complete — gates caught 2 real defects, 2 harness incidents rolled back pre-push and documented, ve
Line replenished (B9 checked): foundry-network specced with network.json stub + experiment; live-shift-theater and cross · foundry-network → spec (new) · 2 ideas (new)

records.name: adversarial-qa-bounties
records.title: Adversarial QA Bounties
records.one_liner: Break a published plugin, earn a permanent Hall entry — community red-teaming as a growth loop.

records.name: commission-queue
records.title: The Commission Queue
records.one_liner: A sanitized public status board for commissions - patrons watch progress without asking.

records.name: commission-tiers
records.title: Commission Tiers
records.one_liner: A pricing experiment — standard, rush, and named-sponsor commissions.

records.name: commit-craft
records.title: Commit Craft
records.one_liner: Drafts conventional commits from the staged diff and guards message format at commit time.

records.name: community-hall
records.title: Hall of Prospectors & Patrons
records.one_liner: Real contributor recognition — who suggested what shipped, who fueled what got built.

records.name: community-voting
records.title: Community Voting
records.one_liner: Free plugin suggestions via GitHub issues, prioritized by 👍 reactions, surfaced live on the window.

records.name: contributor-cards
records.title: Contributor Cards
records.one_liner: A shareable, kraft-styled SVG credit card per contributor - prospects, patronages, breaks, since-date.

records.name: counter-index
records.title: The Counter Index
records.one_liner: Fuzzy search and tag filters on the shelf - find the right plugin in two keystrokes.

records.name: cross-foundry-exchange
records.title: Cross-Foundry Exchange
records.one_liner: Sister foundries pass ideas (and someday commissions) to whichever workshop fits best — a federation of night shifts.

records.name: demo-transcripts
records.title: Demo Transcripts
records.one_liner: Certificates show the plugin working - a terminal-styled example session, honestly labeled until CI records the real thing.

records.name: embed-badges
records.title: Embeds & Badges
records.one_liner: A shields-style status badge and an embeddable ticker — put the living machine on your own site.

records.name: env-doctor
records.title: Env Doctor
records.one_liner: Checks the toolchain against the project's declared versions at session start and warns early.

records.name: field-reports
records.title: Field Reports
records.one_liner: Real user experiences with shipped plugins, surfaced on their birth certificates.

records.name: fork-a-foundry
records.title: Fork a Foundry
records.one_liner: One skill that bootstraps your own self-running plugin workshop — the factory, shipping itself.

records.name: foundry-network
records.title: The Foundry Network
records.one_liner: Forks register as sister foundries; the saga grows a family tree and ideas cross workshop walls.

records.name: fuel-gauge
records.title: The Fuel Gauge
records.one_liner: The month's real API spend, on the window, against the operator's cap — with a Sponsor path to fund the next shift.

records.name: idea-credit-loop
records.title: Idea-Credit Loop
records.one_liner: Community suggestions carry their prospector's name from issue to card to birth certificate — with a thank-you at every milestone.

records.name: live-shift-theater
records.title: Live Shift Theater
records.one_liner: A window page that replays the latest shift's journal as a slow-scrolling theater — watch the machine work.

records.name: night-clerk
records.title: Night Clerk
records.one_liner: Ask Claude Code what plugin helps with X - the clerk searches the foundry catalog and hands you the install line.

records.name: plugin-smith
records.title: Plugin Smith
records.one_liner: Scaffolds new Claude Code plugins and health-checks existing ones against the official spec.

records.name: pr-gated-publishes
records.title: PR-Gated Publishes
records.one_liner: Shifts can land as pull requests — a human veto window that costs the human nothing unless they use it.

records.name: pr-narrator
records.title: PR Narrator
records.one_liner: A subagent that turns a branch's commits and diff into a reviewer-ready PR description.

records.name: releases-and-reverify
records.title: Releases & Weekly Re-verification
records.one_liner: Tags become GitHub Releases with real notes; a weekly cron re-runs every published suite and re-stamps freshness.

records.name: saga-page
records.title: The Saga
records.one_liner: An auto-generated timeline of the workshop's own story — ADRs, ships, kills, ceremonies.

records.name: scannable-window
records.title: Scannable Window
records.one_liner: Jump-nav, glanceable stats strip, and vote counts — the window readable in one sweep.

records.name: session-recap
records.title: Session Recap
records.one_liner: Writes a structured recap when a session ends and recalls it when the next one starts.

records.name: shift-streak
records.title: Shift Streak
records.one_liner: A 12-week heatmap of the loop's real iterations — proof of life at a glance.

records.name: starter-kits
records.title: Starter Kits
records.one_liner: Curated bundles with one copy-block — cut choice paralysis for first-time installers.

records.name: the-almanac
records.title: The Almanac
records.one_liner: A monthly, auto-generated state-of-the-shift: ships, kill rate, cost per ship, the best defect the gates caught.

records.name: the-mailbag
records.title: The Mailbag
records.one_liner: question-labeled issues get answered inside Monday shipnotes - office hours, kept by a machine.

records.name: token-cost-badges
records.title: Token-Cost Badges
records.one_liner: Every card shows what a plugin costs your context — est. always-on tokens, and when it was last verified.

records.name: traveler-pings
records.title: Traveler Pings
records.one_liner: When a suggested idea changes stage, the original issue hears about it - suggesters watch their idea move down the line.

records.name: trust-card
records.title: Trust Card
records.one_liner: A machine-generated footprint block on every plugin certificate - hooks, network, cost, uninstall.

records.name: weekly-shipnote
records.title: Weekly Shipnote
records.one_liner: A weekly digest the loop writes itself — shipped, moved, killed, fuel — posted as an issue every Monday.

records.name: window-watchability
records.title: Window Watchability Pack
records.one_liner: Next-shift countdown, the sharpest-questions wall, and an ergonomics pass - the window becomes worth returning to.
